name: BHAV Acquisition Corp
business: BHAV Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed to acquire a target business. It does not currently operate any business or sell any products. The company intends to focus on acquisition opportunities in advanced and industrial robotics, EVs, drones and UAS, or fintech industries.

exposures.sentence: In particular, we will seek to capitalize on the significant experience and vast network of our management team and board advisors to complete our initial business combination, and we currently intend to focus on opportunities that capitalize on the expertise and ability of our management team, particularly our Chief Executive Officer, to identify, acquire and operate a business in the advanced and industrial robotics, EVs, drones and UAS or fintech industry.

tamClaims.claim: Global advanced robotics industry market size $53.7 billion in 2025, projected $280 billion by 2034 (CAGR ~20%).
tamClaims.sentence: According to Precedence Research, Advanced Robotics Market Size, Share and Trends 2025 to 2034, dated April 2025, the global advanced robotics industry is estimated to reach a market size of approximately $53.7 billion in 2025 and it is projected to reach approximately $280 billion by 2034, representing a compound annual growth rate, or CAGR, of approximately 20%.

tamClaims.claim: Industrial robotics market $55 billion in 2025, projected $291 billion by 2035 (CAGR ~18.1%).
tamClaims.sentence: The industrial robotics market, according to Future Market Insights Inc., Industrial Robotics Market Growth Trends & Forecast 2025 2035, dated February 2025, is also set to grow significantly, with its market valuation expected to grow from approximately $55 billion in 2025 to approximately $291 billion by 2035, reflecting a CAGR of approximately 18.1%.

tamClaims.claim: Drone and UAS market $13.9 billion in 2024, projected $62.3 billion by 2032 (CAGR ~20.8%).
tamClaims.sentence: Further, according to Future Business Insights, as of September 2025, the drones and UAS market was valued at approximately $13.9 billion in 2024, and it is projected to grow from approximately $17.3 billion in 2025 to approximately $62.3 billion by 2032, reflecting a CAGR of approximately 20.8%.

tamClaims.claim: Global EV sales expected to exceed 20 million units in 2025 (based on IEA report).
tamClaims.sentence: The EV market is also continuously expanding, and, based on the IEA's, Global EV Outlook 2025 Trends in electric car markets report, dated July 2025, global EV sales are expected to exceed 20 million units in 2025, an increase of roughly 35% year over year in the first three months of 2025, which represents about one-quarter of cars sold worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: Global fintech market $394.9 billion in 2025, projected $1.13 trillion by 2032 (CAGR ~16.2%).
tamClaims.sentence: Similarly, according to Fortune Business Insights, as of September 2025, the global fintech market is projected to reach approximately $394.9 billion in value in 2025, and it is projected to reach approximately $1.13 trillion by 2032, reflecting a CAGR of approximately 16.2%.
